title: Malty Eggplant Fritters
description: A delicious vegetarian eggplant dish, perfect for a snack or side. The malty flavor adds a unique twist to the traditional eggplant fritters.
instructions: Cut the eggplant into small pieces and place on a baking sheet.
Drizzle with olive oil and roast for 20 minutes.
In a bowl, mash the roasted eggplant with a fork.
Add the malty, crushed chips, and chopped British to the bowl and mix well.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into small patties.
Heat a non-stick pan with a small amount of olive oil over medium heat.
Cook the fritters for 3-4 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Note: You can also bake the fritters in the oven for 15-20 minutes, until crispy and golden brown.
